deltas.releaseNoteText:
[Comments]: `enableVisibilityOptionDropdown()` / `disableVisibilityOptionDropdown()` have been renamed to `enableVisibilityOptions()` / `disableVisibilityOptions()`. Update all call sites accordingly.

[Comments]: The `visibilityOptionDropdown` prop on `<VeltComments>` / `<velt-comments>` has been renamed to `visibilityOptions` / `visibility-options`. Update your component usage accordingly.

[Comments]: `VisibilityOptionClickedEvent.visibility` type has widened from `'public' | 'private'` to `CommentVisibilityOptionType` (`'personal' | 'selected-people' | 'org-users' | 'public'`). Update any `'private'` comparisons to use `'personal'` instead.
deltas.summary: Full rewrite required: prop renamed to `visibilityOptions`, API methods renamed to `enableVisibilityOptions`/`disableVisibilityOptions`, `VisibilityOptionClickedEvent.visibility` type widened to `CommentVisibilityOptionType` (4 values), new optional `users` field added to the event, the banner replaces the dropdown as the UI surface, and new `CommentVisibilityOptionType` type must be documented.

details.signature:
visibilityOptions: boolean (default: false)
enableVisibilityOptions(): void
disableVisibilityOptions(): void

breakingChangeDetails.migrationNote: Replace all 'private' comparisons with 'personal'. The UI surface changed from a two-option dropdown (public/private) inside the composer to a persistent four-option banner below the composer.

deltas.releaseNoteText:
[Comments]: Added a Comment Visibility Banner to `<VeltComments>` / `<velt-comments>` that replaces the previous visibility dropdown. Enable it with `visibilityOptions`. Users see a persistent banner below the composer with four visibility levels — `public`, `org-users`, `personal`, and `selected-people` — and an inline user-picker (search, avatar list, multi-select) when `selected-people` is chosen.

The banner surface is fully wireframe-customizable via the new `VeltCommentDialogWireframe.VisibilityBanner.*` / `velt-comment-dialog-visibility-banner-*` family.

[Comments]: The `velt-comment-dialog-visibility-dropdown-*` wireframe family has been removed and replaced by the new `velt-comment-dialog-visibility-banner-*` family. Migrate any custom wireframes to the new components shown in the New Features section above.
deltas.summary: Remove the entire `VisibilityDropdown` wireframe section (component list + usage block + HTML equivalents) and replace with the new `VisibilityBanner.*` wireframe family; the old `velt-comment-dialog-visibility-dropdown-*` family is removed and the new `velt-comment-dialog-visibility-banner-*` family with 24+ components (Icon, Text, Dropdown, Dropdown.Trigger, Dropdown.Trigger.Label, Dropdown.Trigger.AvatarList, Dropdown.Trigger.AvatarList.Item, Dropdown.Trigger.AvatarList.RemainingCount, Dropdown.Trigger.Icon, Dropdown.Content, Dropdown.Content.Item[type], Dropdown.Content.Item.Icon, Dropdown.Content.Item.Label, Dropdown.Content.UserPicker, Dropdown.Content.UserPicker.Search, Dropdown.Content.UserPicker.Search.Icon, Dropdown.Content.UserPicker.Search.Input, Dropdown.Content.UserPicker.Header, Dropdown.Content.UserPicker.Header.Count, Dropdown.Content.UserPicker.Header.UnselectAll, Dropdown.Content.UserPicker.Item, Dropdown.Content.UserPicker.Item.Avatar, Dropdown.Content.UserPicker.Item.Info, Dropdown.Content.UserPicker.Item.Check) must be documented.

Document the new `AddCommentRequest.visibility` field on `addComment()`: developers can now set `CommentVisibilityConfig` at comment creation time via the `visibility` property, eliminating the need for a post-creation `updateVisibility()` call when visibility is known at creation.

parameters.name: request.visibility
parameters.description: Set comment visibility at creation time. Accepts the same CommentVisibilityConfig shape used by updateVisibility(). Previously only settable after creation.

deltas.releaseNoteText: [Comments]: `CommentSaveTriggeredEvent` now includes a `commentAnnotation` field with the full annotation object at save time. Handlers for `onCommentSaveTriggered` can now access comment content, assignment, and visibility state without a separate lookup.
deltas.summary: Add `commentAnnotation: CommentAnnotation` to the `CommentSaveTriggeredEvent` interface block, and remove the existing key behavior note claiming the event has a smaller payload than `CommentSavedEvent` (line 90), since the event now carries the full annotation object.

parameters.name: commentAnnotation
parameters.description: Full annotation object at save time. Provides comment content, assignment, and visibility state without a separate lookup.

deltas.staleContentToRemove: - `CommentSaveTriggeredEvent` has a smaller payload than `CommentSavedEvent` — it does not include the full `commentAnnotation` object.

skippedItems.releaseNoteText: [Comments]: `VisibilityOptionClickedEvent` now includes an optional `users` field containing the list of selected users when `visibility === 'selected-people'`. Previously, the event only reported the visibility type string.
skippedItems.reason: Absorbed into delta-001: the `users` field is part of the full `VisibilityOptionClickedEvent` interface rewrite required by the method/prop renames and type widening. Splitting it into a separate delta would require patching the same interface block twice.

skippedItems.releaseNoteText: [Comments]: `VisibilityOptionClickedEvent.visibility` type has widened from `'public' | 'private'` to `CommentVisibilityOptionType` (`'personal' | 'selected-people' | 'org-users' | 'public'`). Update any `'private'` comparisons to use `'personal'` instead.
skippedItems.reason: Absorbed into delta-001: the type widening is part of the same `permissions-visibility-option-dropdown.md` rewrite covering the rename, new type, and new event field. No separate delta needed.
